high.label: High
high.description: 非常确信估计值接近真实效应：进一步研究不太可能改变我们对效应估计的信心
high.definition: We are very confident that the true effect lies close to that of the estimate of the effect.

moderate.label: Moderate
moderate.description: 对估计值有中等信心：真实效应可能接近估计值，但也可能存在实质差别
moderate.definition: We are moderately confident in the effect estimate: the true effect is likely to be close to the estimate of the effect, but there is a possibility that it is substantially different.

low.label: Low
low.description: 对估计值的信心有限：真实效应可能与估计值有实质差别
low.definition: Our confidence in the effect estimate is limited: the true effect may be substantially different from the estimate of the effect.

very_low.label: Very Low
very_low.description: 对估计值几乎没有信心：真实效应可能与估计值大不相同
very_low.definition: We have very little confidence in the effect estimate: the true effect is likely to be substantially different from the estimate of effect.

low.description: 大多数证据来自低偏倚风险的研究

moderate.description: 部分研究存在偏倚风险问题

high.description: 大多数研究存在严重偏倚风险

low.description: 人群、干预、对照、结局均直接
95% CI窄，最优信息样本量充足

large_effect.name: 大效应量
large_effect.criteria: 效应量 > 2 (RR > 2 或 RR < 0.5) 且无法用偏倚或混杂解释

dose_response.name: 剂量反应关系
dose_response.criteria: 存在明确的剂量-反应梯度

confounding.name: 混杂因素方向
confounding.criteria: 所有合理的混杂因素都会降低效应量

rct.rationale: 随机对照试验初始定为高质量证据

observational.rationale: 观察性研究初始定为低质量证据
